title: Global Function Tools
subtitle: Manage function tools visible to conversations and runtime profiles. Disabled tools are no longer exposed to the model for new requests.
loadingDescription: Reading available tools and enabled state.

empty.title: No tools
empty.description: The main process has not returned any global function tools yet.

errors.title: Load failed
errors.unavailable: This window does not expose the tool management API.
errors.saveFailed: Failed to save tool state. The UI state was rolled back.
errors.setEnabledUnavailable: The current tool API does not support enabled-state changes.
